prompt:

A soft aeration bubble stream and a simple clip-on breeder ring (unbranded) appear nearby to hint at breeding-tank utility, without adding clutter or any readable text.

Ultra-detailed, photorealistic 512×512 image with a grounded near-future solarpunk aquarium aesthetic: soft cinematic lighting, clean water highlights, no logos, no readable labels, and no on-image text. Composition is simple and centered so the floating plant reads clearly as an inventory icon.
